constraint.description: Transactional methods must not be invoked from the same class or from a subclass within the inheritance hierarchy if the transactional semantics of the invoked method requires a change to the current transaction handling.
constraint.cypher: // If the target transaction semantics is SUPPORTS, the transaction handling will not change regardless of the source transaction semantics. It is therefore handled separately in the WHERE clause. WITH [ {sourceTx: 'REQUIRED', targetTx: 'REQUIRED'}, {sourceTx: 'REQUIRES_NEW', targetTx: 'REQUIRED'}, {sourceTx: 'MANDATORY', targetTx: 'REQUIRED'}, {sourceTx: 'NESTED', targetTx: 'REQUIRED'}, {sourceTx: 'NEVER', targetTx: 'NEVER'}, {sourceTx: 'NOT_SUPPORTED', targetTx: 'NEVER'}, {sourceTx: 'NEVER', targetTx: 'NOT_SUPPORTED'}, {sourceTx: 'NOT_SUPPORTED', targetTx: 'NOT_SUPPORTED'}, {sourceTx: 'REQUIRED', targetTx: 'MANDATORY'}, {sourceTx: 'REQUIRES_NEW', targetTx: 'MANDATORY'}, {sourceTx: 'MANDATORY', targetTx: 'MANDATORY'}, {sourceTx: 'NESTED', targetTx: 'MANDATORY'} ] as semanticsCombinationsWithoutTransactionChange MATCH (artifact:Artifact)-[:CONTAINS]->(callingType:Java:Type), (callingType)-[:DECLARES]->(sourceTxMethod:Method:JEE:Transactional), (callingType)<-[:DECLARES*0..]-(:Java:Type)-[:EXTENDS|IMPLEMENTS*0..]->(:Java:Type)-[:DECLARES]->(targetTxMethod:Method:JEE:Transactional), path = (sourceTxMethod)-[invokes:INVOKES*]->(targetTxMethod) WHERE // Violations are direct calls from callingMethod to calledMethods and those with synthetic or private methods in between ALL(intermediateMethod IN nodes(path)[1..-1] WHERE (intermediateMethod.synthetic IS NOT NULL AND intermediateMethod.synthetic OR intermediateMethod.visibility = 'private')) AND NOT ( artifact:Test OR callingType:Generated // Synthetic callers themselves are not handled as violations since the developer cannot control their generation OR (sourceTxMethod.synthetic IS NOT NULL AND sourceTxMethod.synthetic) OR ( {sourceTx: sourceTxMethod.transactionPropagation, targetTx: targetTxMethod.transactionPropagation} IN semanticsCombinationsWithoutTransactionChange ) // If the targetTxMethod has the SUPPORTS semantics, it never changes the current transaction OR targetTxMethod.transactionPropagation = 'SUPPORTS' ) RETURN DISTINCT callingType as Type, sourceTxMethod AS SourceTransactionalMethod, sourceTxMethod.transactionPropagation AS SourceSemantics, targetTxMethod AS TargetTransactionalMethod, targetTxMethod.transactionPropagation AS TargetSemantics, invokes[0].lineNumber as LineNumber ORDER BY Type.fqn, SourceTransactionalMethod.name, TargetTransactionalMethod.name

constraint.description: Private methods must not be annotated with "jakarta.transaction.Transactional" or "javax.transaction.Transactional".
constraint.cypher: MATCH (artifact:Artifact)-[:CONTAINS]->(type:Java:Type)-[:DECLARES]->(method:Java:Method {visibility: "private"}), (method:Method)-[:ANNOTATED_BY]->()-[:OF_TYPE]->(annotationType:Java:Type) WHERE annotationType.fqn in [ "jakarta.transaction.Transactional", "javax.transaction.Transactional" ] AND NOT ( artifact:Test OR type:Generated ) RETURN type as Type, method as Method

concept.cypher: MATCH (type:Type)-[:DECLARES]->(transactionalMethod:JEE:Transactional:Method) RETURN type as Type, transactionalMethod as TransactionalMethod, transactionalMethod.transactionPropagation as TransactionPropagation ORDER BY type.fqn, transactionalMethod.signature
